sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116359" key="w(roqete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡρο-θετέω</orth>, <sense id="n116359.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take note</tr_> of a thing <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in casting a nativity,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν Ἄρη καὶ τὸν Κρόνον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.160</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="II" id="n116359.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be in the ascendant at the natal hour,</tr_> of one's ruling planet, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡροθετεῖ σε Κρόνος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1468.tlg001:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">161</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
